mnemonics.title: LINE
mnemonics.content: LINE: Linearity, Independence, Normality, Equal variance

acronyms.usage: Predicting continuous outcomes based on multiple predictor variables

visualTips.visualization: Imagine a linear equation with multiple predictor variables, each with a coefficient that represents the change in the outcome variable for a one-unit change in the predictor variable, while holding all other predictor variables constant.

analogies.analogy: A recipe for making a cake, where the ingredients (predictor variables) are combined in specific proportions (coefficients) to produce a desired outcome (the cake).
